title: BOOKS Eva RE and Eva SLOT Scans
display_title: BOOKS Eva RE and Eva SLOT Scans
wikitext:
[]: [BOOKS] Eva RE & Eva SLOT Scans             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Mar 29, 2009 3:53 am Some new scans from some 6 books I got. (big pics) Ill update as often as I can http://www.zeak.com.au/eva/Asuka_Rei.jpg http://www.zeak.com.au/eva/Misato.gif http://www.zeak.com.au/eva/misato_Kaji.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sun Mar 29, 2009 3:54 am What are the names of the books, btw? and I think you should use thumbnails... my pics in picture thread got taken down because they were too big.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 29, 2009 4:01 am Yes -- please provide sources and use thumbnails (or, at least, don't embed the images).

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Mar 29, 2009 6:52 am I don't know the name's of the books but hears the covers. I have vols 01 - 06. I am missing 00 http://www.zeak.com.au/scan0001.jpg http://www.zeak.com.au/scan0005.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 29, 2009 7:12 am I've seen those on ebay a couple times. Aren't they called "Studio files" or something? You don't see them too often. Would you say they're worth buying? (Do they have interviews, what kinds of images do they have?) I saw a Rei one a while ago, but it was Rebuild Rei. EDIT: Wait, nevermind. I don't know what I'm talking about. I've heard of Eva-Re, they sell them at the Eva store. There was a guy selling a kaworu shirt that came with one of the issues a while back.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Mar 29, 2009 7:26 am Yeah I have the shirt. It has some interviews. In I think vol 02 with the girls who play Maya and Ritsuko. Ill scan them tomorow and post them if you want.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 29, 2009 7:29 am Zeak wrote: Yeah I have the shirt. It has some interviews. In I think vol 02 with the girls who play Maya and Ritsuko. Ill scan them tomorow and post them if you want.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 29, 2009 7:49 am It says "Eva Slot", and "Eva Re" You can buy those from amazon for like 5 bucks , it's a monthly magazine, there are a ton of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sun Mar 29, 2009 8:35 am The downside to Amazon is that you can't pay with paypal. You have to be an older chum to order with a credit card or checking account. Thanks for link, though (I will find a way!!!).

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sun Mar 29, 2009 8:51 am Misato with a corona still makes me lawl. I wish I knew Japanese~ D:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 29, 2009 12:43 pm The Amazon reviews look pretty mixed. Some of the art looks cool, but I wonder if there is really any content to speak of. I might have to investigate a little deeper. (When I feel like sifting through loads of Moonspeak -- there doesn't seem to be anything on these in English.) Zeak wrote: [url]http://www.zeak.com.au/scan0005.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Sun Mar 29, 2009 2:42 pm Ill redo it. I rushed that one. Was very late at night. So I hit quick scan

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sun Mar 29, 2009 3:14 pm Atleast your scanner works... my scanner is... You put a pic in, scan, then its not on computer. NO IDEA WHERE THEY GO.
